architectureDecision.label: Manifest primary, artifact fallback
architectureDecision.rationale: Publish reads release evidence manifest for exact SHA; falls back to Actions artifact API if manifest missing but tarball exists.

readyReview.decision: Publish triggers release-readiness; resolves tarball via manifest then artifact fallback; fails closed without exact-SHA evidence.

technicalBreakdown: Refactor publish-npm.yml to verify release evidence for dispatch SHA.
Resolve tarball path from manifest entry, else Actions artifact by SHA+version name.
Remove duplicate build/test/parity from publish; minimal integrity check only.
Keep npm publish secret scoped to publish workflow only.

acceptanceCriteria: Publish refuses when no passing release-readiness/parity evidence exists for dispatch SHA.
Publish resolves validated tarball via release evidence manifest, with Actions artifact fallback.
Publish does not rerun duplicate build, test, maintainer-gates, or full parity.
npm publish uses the validated tarball, not fresh runner build output.
